query:
select
            rs.product_id,
            rs.id,
            rs.state,
            case when exists (
                select o.id
                from OptionalRequirements o
                where o.product_id = $1 and o.id = rs.id
            ) then true
            else false
            end as "optional!:bool"
        from RequirementVerificationStates rs
        where rs.product_id = $1
